LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH TWENTY DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND FROM THE DATE OF FILING OF AN ORDER DENYING THE PENDING ANTI-SLAPP MOTION IN WHOLE OR IN PART. IN THE EVENT THAT THE PENDING ANTI-SLAPP MOTION IS GRANTED IN ITS ENTIRETY, THE COMPLAINT WILL BE STRICKEN AND PLAINTIFF WILL NOT BE GIVEN LEAVE TO AMEND. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER THAT TRACKS THE TENTATIVE RULING VERBATIM AND COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976.

Off Calendar Jan-29-2020 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Dec-20-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Joshu Watson, Esq. 916-777-7777 of the Arnold Law Firm for Plaintiff.
Sundar Natarajan, MD, CEO of Plaintiff, Central Valley Hospitalists is present.
Stephen Schear, Esq. personal attorney of Dr. Natarajan is also present.

RULING - A R G U E D. Plaintiff requests for an In-camera hearing on the first calling of the case. 10:17 am, Defendant's Counsel on Court call hangs up. In-Camera hearing is held which involves attorney-client privilege. The reporter's transcript is ordered sealed. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

CLAYEO C. ARNOLD APC, JOSHUA H. WATSON, CLAYEO C. ARNOLD'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL.

Denied. (as fully reported in the reporter's sealed notes/transcript)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-09-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with twenty days leave to amend from the date of filing of an order denying the pending anti-SLAPP motion in whole or in part. In the event that the pending anti-SLAPP motion is granted in its entirety, the complaint will be stricken and plaintiff will not be given leave to amend. The prevailing party is to prepare a form of order that tracks the tentative ruling verbatim and comply with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-06-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

Appearances: Joshua H. Watson of the Arnold Law Firm (916.777.7777) for plaintiff and opposing party; Craig S. Rutenberg and Doreen Wener Shenfeld of Manatt Phelps & Phillips, LLP (310.312.4333) for defendant and moving party

Argued and the Court takes the matter under submission. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR 5976
